mapper.insert: insert into account_statement_task_cursor ( user_id, currency, task_type, pending_month, last_done_seq, updated_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{currency}, #{taskType}, #{pendingMonth}, #{lastDoneSeq}, #{updatedTime} ) on conflict (user_id, currency, task_type) do update set pending_month = excluded.pending_month, last_done_seq = coalesce(excluded.last_done_seq, account_statement_task_cursor.last_done_seq), updated_time = excluded.updated_time
mapper.select: select id, user_id, currency, task_type, pending_month, last_done_seq, updated_time from account_statement_task_cursor where task_type = #{taskType} and pending_month is not null and pending_month != '' order by updated_time asc, id asc limit #{limitSize}
